title: Chapter 5: Alternate Reality
content: The morning rush hour in the London Underground is a sea of gray faces and tired eyes. As you lean against the sliding doors, a man in a worn-out denim jacket bumps into you.||Instead of apologizing, he whispers, 'I knew Vane. I have something you need to see, Detective. Meet me at Camden Town tonight, 9 PM. Alleyway behind the lock. Don't be late.'||Before you can grab his arm, he disappears into the crowd at the next stop. Vane had many sources, but this one felt different—dirtier.
